nodes.title: STAGE SWITCHER — work one layer at a time

widgets_values: PER-LAYER SAM3 SCOPE — a depth band alone cuts through objects; each row here makes a band layer keep ONLY its segmented content (band ∩ segment). exclude_mask becomes sky ∪ NOT(grown segment), and the layer's auto paint matte follows (in-band minus exclude). Per shot: type each row's prompt, then UN-BYPASS that row's MaskComposite (Ctrl+B) to activate. A bypassed row passes the plain sky mask through = band-only behavior. The 'far' row ships ACTIVE with prompt 'trees' as the worked example. GrowMask 16px keeps silhouettes from clipping.
nodes.title: SAM scope doctrine

groups.title: 0 · SOLVE + CONFIRM (ALWAYS ON) — first queue stops at ✅
SHARED (ALWAYS ON) — depth, LaMa, SAM3 sky mask rails
1 · SKY  (sky card only — its mask rail lives in SHARED)
STAGE SWITCHER — lists ONLY stages 1–6 (solve/shared are always-on). Bypass stages you have NOT reached; finished stages cache free. To skip solve approval permanently: Ctrl+B the gate node.
SAM SCOPE (optional) — per-layer semantic masks; un-bypass a row's MaskComposite to activate
